column1: GTCO remains committed to promoting gender equality and women empowerment which promotes a decent
work environment and economic growth. Guaranty Trust Holding Company promotes women’s full and
effective participation and equal opportunities for leadership at all levels of decision-making in its workplace.
Approximately 51.90% of employees are females with 37.09% female representation on Boards across the
subsidiaries. Also, we are committed towards non-discrimination in the diversity of our workforce including
